# 格式：类型 x y 宽 高 编号
wall 0 0 800 50 999
wall 0 550 800 50 999
wall 0 0 50 600 999
wall 750 0 50 600 999
wall 0 350 300 100 999
wall 170 125 210 125 999
wall 380 125 90 475 999
wall 560 0 90 470 999
player 60 460 40 40 999
box 315 285 40 40 1
tree 380 60 40 40 1
door 650 50 100 50 999
checkpoint 495 70 40 40 1
